description: User taps the Cancel button on an inline keyboard (iq:cancel from /plan flow)
trigger: Send /plan in private chat, tap '✖ Cancel' button
notes: callbackQuery.id is a unique string per button tap — not stable across sessions
callbackQuery.data is the payload string set on the InlineKeyboardButton
callbackQuery.message is the bot message the keyboard was attached to — includes full text and reply_markup
callbackQuery.message.from.id is the BOT's user ID (not the user), since the bot sent the message
callbackQuery.chat_instance identifies the chat where the button was shown
ctx.chat and ctx.from are still the user's private chat / user identity
No ctx.message at top level — callback_query ctx does not have a message property directly

message.text:
